gui.neoorigins.search.label: Search origins
gui.neoorigins.hint.select: Select an origin to view details
origins.neoorigins.human.name: Human
origins.neoorigins.human.description: A regular human being, with no special powers but well-rounded abilities.
origins.neoorigins.merling.name: Merling
origins.neoorigins.merling.description: An aquatic people born in the open ocean — breathes water and swims with ease, but slow and dries out on dry land.
origins.neoorigins.avian.name: Avian
origins.neoorigins.avian.description: A graceful flier who drifts down slowly, fears no heights, and watches the world from above.
origins.neoorigins.blazeling.name: Blazeling
origins.neoorigins.blazeling.description: Born of the nether fires — scaled in brimstone, restored in the dark realm, but poisoned by water and rain.
origins.neoorigins.elytrian.name: Elytrian
origins.neoorigins.elytrian.description: A pure flight specialist — soars through the skies, untouched by kinetic forces, but fragile of frame and incapable of bearing heavy armor.
origins.neoorigins.enderian.name: Enderian
origins.neoorigins.enderian.description: Born on the outer islands of the End — teleports at will, dodges projectiles into the void, and walks unseen by endermen. Water burns like acid.
origins.neoorigins.arachnid.name: Arachnid
origins.neoorigins.arachnid.description: Nimble spider-folk who scale any wall, fling webs at foes, and strike with fangs — kin to the eight-legged crawlers of the world.
origins.neoorigins.shulk.name: Shulk
origins.neoorigins.shulk.description: Armored like a shulker — shrugs off blows, retreats into a shell when cornered, and launches foes skyward with a levitation burst. Slow, but unshakeable.
origins.neoorigins.phantom.name: Phantom
origins.neoorigins.phantom.description: A spectral being — gliding through the night on elytra wings, drawing strength from kills, but burned by sunlight and unable to rest.
power.neoorigins.merling_dries_out.name: Dries Out
power.neoorigins.merling_dries_out.descr: Air ticks down while you're out of water — surface too long and you suffocate.
power.neoorigins.avian_no_fall_damage.de: Takes no damage from falling — wings catch the wind.
power.neoorigins.avian_slow_fall.name: Slow Falling
power.neoorigins.avian_slow_fall.descrip: Toggleable: drifts slowly downward. Disabled by default. Note: critical hits require falling normally, so keep this off to crit.
Uses 75% less energy from all actions.
power.neoorigins.avian_keen_sight.name: Keen Sight
power.neoorigins.avian_keen_sight.descri: Sharpened eyes — see a little better in the dark.
power.neoorigins.avian_hollow_bones.name: Hollow Bones
power.neoorigins.avian_hollow_bones.desc: −2 max HP. Light body, fragile frame.
power.neoorigins.avian_feather_hop.name: Feather Hop
power.neoorigins.avian_feather_hop.descr: Flutter-jump upward with a quick burst of wing. No hunger cost.
power.neoorigins.blazeling_fire_immunity: Immune to fire, lava, magma, and burning — the fire within answers the fire without.
+3 natural armor from overlapping brimstone plates.
power.neoorigins.blazeling_nether_born.d: Slow regeneration while in the Nether — home heals its own.
power.neoorigins.blazeling_internal_heat: Inner fire burns hot — hunger drains 25% faster.
Water is poison — takes 1.5 damage per second while in water or rain.
Eyes tuned to infrared — see clearly in the dark.
power.neoorigins.blazeling_firebolt.name: Firebolt
power.neoorigins.blazeling_firebolt.desc: Hurl a small fireball in the direction you're looking. Costs 2 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_elytra_boost.d: Gains a burst of speed when launching with an elytra.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_flight.name: Natural Flight
power.neoorigins.elytrian_flight.descrip: Glide like an elytra user — no item required. Press jump while falling to spread your wings.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_flight_speed.d: +30% flight speed — the sky bends to you.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_no_fall.name: Feather Fall
power.neoorigins.elytrian_no_kinetic.des: Immune to elytra-collision damage — fly into walls without consequence.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_fragile.name: Frail Frame
power.neoorigins.elytrian_fragile.descri: −4 max HP. Hollow bones trade durability for loft.
power.neoorigins.elytrian_no_heavy_armor: Cannot wear iron, gold, diamond, or netherite armor — leather and chainmail only. Wings must stay light.
power.neoorigins.strider_stampede.name: Stampede
power.neoorigins.strider_stampede.descri: Charge forward on thick legs. Costs 2 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.golem_ground_slam.name: Ground Slam
power.neoorigins.golem_ground_slam.descr: Slam the earth with iron fists — 4 damage and Slowness II for 4 seconds to all nearby enemies in a 5-block radius. Costs 3 hunger. 7-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.enderian_ender_eyes.des: Endermen ignore your gaze — look at them without provoking an attack.
power.neoorigins.enderian_projectile_dod: 50% chance to teleport away and avoid damage when struck by a projectile.
power.neoorigins.enderian_water_damage.d: Takes 2 damage per second from contact with water or rain.
power.neoorigins.enderian_teleport.name: Ender Warp
power.neoorigins.enderian_teleport.descr: Teleport to where you're looking — up to 50 blocks. Costs 2 hunger. 3-second cooldown.
Cling to any vertical surface — press against a wall to grip, jump to climb, hold sneak to stay in place. Fall damage is avoided while gripping.
power.neoorigins.arachnid_cobweb_affinit: Moves through cobwebs without being slowed and breaks them almost instantly.
power.neoorigins.arachnid_entity_group.d: Counts as an arthropod — extra damage from Bane of Arthropods weapons.
power.neoorigins.arachnid_spiders_fang.d: Melee attacks inject venom — targets suffer Poison I for 3 seconds.
power.neoorigins.arachnid_cobweb_project: Throws a cobweb that places itself on impact, tangling anything it lands on. Costs 2 hunger.
power.neoorigins.shulk_natural_armor.des: Has permanent natural armor without needing equipment.
Active: release a burst of levitation shells — nearby enemies float upward for 3 seconds. Costs 2 hunger. 8-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.shulk_shell_retreat.des: Active: vanish into your shell and reappear up to 12 blocks away. Costs 3 hunger. 10-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.shulk_levitation_immuni: Immune to levitation — your shell keeps you rooted when bullets come back.
power.neoorigins.phantom_night_vision.de: Can see clearly in total darkness.
power.neoorigins.phantom_form.name: Phantom Form
power.neoorigins.phantom_flight.name: Spectral Wings
power.neoorigins.phantom_flight.descript: Glide like an elytra user — no item required. Press jump while falling to spread your wings.
power.neoorigins.phantom_elytra_boost.de: Gains a burst of speed when launching into flight — phantoms ride their wings hard.
power.neoorigins.phantom_moon_armor.name: Moonplate
power.neoorigins.phantom_moon_armor.desc: +4 natural armor under the moon (night only). Daylight strips the protection.
power.neoorigins.phantom_soul_drain.name: Soul Drain
power.neoorigins.phantom_soul_drain.desc: Heal 1 HP every time you kill a living entity.
power.neoorigins.phantom_no_fall.name: Weightless
power.neoorigins.phantom_no_fall.descrip: Takes no fall damage — ghostly bodies don't land.
power.neoorigins.phantom_sunburn.name: Sunburn
power.neoorigins.phantom_sunburn.descrip: Catches fire and takes 1.5 damage per second in direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.phantom_fragile.name: Fragile Form
power.neoorigins.phantom_fragile.descrip: −4 max HP. A body of mist is easy to dispel.
power.neoorigins.phantom_no_sleep.name: Sleepless Dread
power.neoorigins.phantom_no_sleep.descri: Cannot sleep — the night is your element.
origins.neoorigins.feline.name: Feline
origins.neoorigins.feline.description: A quick cat-person with keen night vision and a pouncing leap — lands on their feet, slips past wolves and ocelots, but loathes water and hungers quickly.
power.neoorigins.feline_no_fall_damage.d: Always lands safely. Takes no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.feline_night_vision.des: Can see clearly in the dark.
power.neoorigins.feline_speed_boost.name: Agile
power.neoorigins.feline_speed_boost.desc: Moves 10% faster than a normal human.
power.neoorigins.feline_mobs_ignore.name: Predator's Calm
power.neoorigins.feline_mobs_ignore.desc: Passive mobs do not startle and neutral mobs ignore you unless provoked.
power.neoorigins.feline_water_weakness.d: Takes 50% more damage from all sources — clumsy when panicked.
power.neoorigins.feline_hunger_drain.des: Gets hungry 30% faster than a human.
origins.neoorigins.golem.name: Golem
origins.neoorigins.golem.description: A walking fortress of iron and will — nearly immovable, but slow and vulnerable to heat.
power.neoorigins.golem_natural_armor.des: Has 6 natural armor points even while unequipped.
power.neoorigins.golem_size.name: Towering Frame
power.neoorigins.golem_size.description: Is 30% larger than a normal player.
power.neoorigins.golem_effect_immunity.d: Immune to poison, wither, and hunger.
power.neoorigins.golem_slow_movement.des: Moves 25% slower than a normal human.
power.neoorigins.golem_fire_weakness.des: Takes 80% more damage from fire, lava, and magma block contact — iron conducts heat.
origins.neoorigins.caveborn.name: Caveborn
origins.neoorigins.caveborn.description: Raised in the deep dark — eats raw stone, chews through ore with bare hands, but withers in sunlight.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_night_vision.d: Eyes attuned to the deep dark — no torches needed.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_no_fall_damage: Knows how to land on uneven ground. Takes no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_mining_speed.d: Breaks all blocks twice as fast — the stone yields to familiar hands.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_stone_fists.de: Bare hands mine like a stone pickaxe — break ores and stone without tools.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_mining_fortune: While Luck is active (granted by eating diamond), ore blocks drop as if mined with Fortune II.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_stone.name: Stone Eater
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_stone.desc: Can eat cobblestone, stone, granite, diorite, andesite, tuff, deepslate, basalt, and blackstone for modest nutrition.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_iron.name: Iron Palate
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_iron.descr: Can eat iron ingots, raw iron, and iron nuggets — a proper meal for a miner.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_gold.name: Gilded Palate
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_gold.descr: Can eat gold ingots, raw gold, and gold nuggets — richer sustenance.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_eat_diamond.de: Can eat diamonds — comparable to a golden carrot in saturation.
Can eat netherite ingots and scrap — the richest meal in the world.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_iron_bonus.des: Eating iron grants Haste I for 60 seconds.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_gold_bonus.des: Eating gold grants Speed I for 2 minutes.
Eating diamond grants Luck II for 5 minutes — enables Mining Fortune while active.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_netherite_bonu: Eating netherite grants Strength I and Resistance I for 5 minutes.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_daylight_damag: Catches fire and takes 1 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.caveborn_small_frame.de: 85% the size of a normal player — tight tunnels are easy.
origins.neoorigins.sylvan.name: Sylvan
origins.neoorigins.sylvan.description: A spirit of the old forest — swift among the trees, loved by wildlife, and able to entangle foes with a surge of roots. Healed by rain, but scorched by the Nether.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_mobs_ignore.name: One With Nature
power.neoorigins.sylvan_mobs_ignore.desc: Hostile mobs leave you alone — they only retaliate if you strike first.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_regen_in_water.d: Slowly heals while in contact with water.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_forest_speed.des: Gains a speed boost while in forest biomes.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_nether_damage.de: Takes 1 damage per second while in Nether biomes. Frost Walker boots fully prevent the damage.
origins.neoorigins.draconic.name: Draconic
origins.neoorigins.draconic.description: Dragon-blooded and fearsome — immune to fire and terrifying to beasts, but an insatiable appetite comes with the power.
Immune to fire, lava, magma, and burning — dragon-blood runs hot.
power.neoorigins.draconic_slow_fall.name: Wing Cushion
power.neoorigins.draconic_slow_fall.desc: Vestigial wings break your fall — takes no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.draconic_scare_mobs.des: Most passive creatures — livestock, villagers, wildlife — flee your draconic presence.
power.neoorigins.draconic_size.name: Imposing Stature
power.neoorigins.draconic_size.descripti: 20% larger than a normal player — hard to miss.
power.neoorigins.draconic_water_weakness: Drowning damage is doubled — fire needs to breathe.
power.neoorigins.draconic_hunger_drain.d: Gets hungry 50% faster — the flame burns hot.
origins.neoorigins.revenant.name: Revenant
origins.neoorigins.revenant.description: An undead wanderer who phases through matter and hurls bolts of withering rot — cannot drown and sees in darkness, but heals slowly and burns in sunlight.
power.neoorigins.revenant_entity_group.d: Classified as undead. Harmed by Instant Health, healed by Instant Damage, immune to Poison.
power.neoorigins.revenant_water_breathin: Does not need to breathe. Can survive indefinitely underwater.
power.neoorigins.revenant_night_vision.d: Can see clearly in total darkness.
power.neoorigins.revenant_daylight_damag: Catches fire and takes 2 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.revenant_slow_regen.des: Natural health regeneration is reduced to 40% of normal.
origins.neoorigins.tiny.name: Tiny
origins.neoorigins.tiny.description: Small in stature but quick and nimble — climbs anything, pulls in items, but hits like a feather.
power.neoorigins.tiny_size.name: Diminutive
power.neoorigins.tiny_size.description: 50% the size of a normal player.
power.neoorigins.tiny_wall_climbing.name: Surface Grip
power.neoorigins.tiny_wall_climbing.desc: Can scale any wall with ease.
power.neoorigins.tiny_speed_boost.name: Scurry
power.neoorigins.tiny_speed_boost.descri: Moves 20% faster than a normal human.
power.neoorigins.tiny_no_fall_damage.des: So small that falling barely matters. Takes no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.tiny_item_magnetism.des: Items are attracted from a greater distance.
power.neoorigins.tiny_hunger_drain.name: Tiny Stomach
power.neoorigins.tiny_hunger_drain.descr: Gets hungry 80% faster — small bodies burn food quickly.
origins.neoorigins.abyssal.name: Abyssal
origins.neoorigins.abyssal.description: A creature of the crushing deep, born in the open ocean — armored with pressure-hardened skin, wielding a starting trident, and calling guardians to their side. Withered by sunlight and slow on dry land.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_water_breathing: Breathes water as naturally as air.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_thorns_aura.des: Returns 30% of received damage back to attackers.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_natural_armor.d: Deep-sea biology grants +2 armor at all times.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_underwater_mini: Mines at full speed even when submerged.
Heals gradually while in water — roughly 1 HP every 3 seconds.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_daylight_damage: Takes 1.5 damage per second when exposed to sunlight.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_dries_out.name: Dries Out
power.neoorigins.abyssal_dries_out.descr: Air ticks down while you're out of water — surface too long and you suffocate.
origins.neoorigins.voidwalker.name: Voidwalker
origins.neoorigins.voidwalker.descriptio: A being touched by the End — phases through blocks, blinks short distances, and walks unseen by most threats. Sprints without tiring, but water is agony.
power.neoorigins.voidwalker_active_telep: Blinks to where you are looking (up to 24 blocks). Costs 2 hunger. 80-tick cooldown.
Mobs do not notice your presence unless you attack them.
power.neoorigins.voidwalker_water_damage: Takes 1 damage per second while in water or rain — the void fears water.
origins.neoorigins.stoneguard.name: Stoneguard
origins.neoorigins.stoneguard.descriptio: Born of living stone — an unshakeable sentinel who sheds thorns onto attackers, mines rock with bare hands, and sets glowstone torches into the dark. Slow, but unmoving ground never leaves them.
Returns 20% of received damage to attackers.
power.neoorigins.stoneguard_slow_movemen: Moves 10% slower than a normal human.
power.neoorigins.stoneguard_no_mob_spawn: Monsters do not spawn within 24 blocks.
origins.neoorigins.verdant.name: Verdant
origins.neoorigins.verdant.description: A living embodiment of the green world — tireless, at peace with the wild, but utterly destroyed by the Nether's corruption.
power.neoorigins.verdant_mobs_ignore.des: Animals and neutral mobs will never attack you unprovoked.
Roots cushion every fall. Takes no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.verdant_forest_regen.de: Slowly regenerates health while in forest biomes.
power.neoorigins.verdant_nether_damage.d: Takes 2 damage per second while in the Nether. Frost Walker boots fully prevent the damage.
origins.neoorigins.umbral.name: Umbral
origins.neoorigins.umbral.description: A child of shadow — hurls orbs of dark energy, dashes between positions, and deflects arrows. Swift in the dark, burned by sunlight.
power.neoorigins.umbral_active_dash.name: Shadow Dash
power.neoorigins.umbral_active_dash.desc: Bursts forward at high speed in the direction you're moving. Costs 2 hunger. 60-tick cooldown.
Takes 1 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.umbral_projectile_immun: Arrows pass harmlessly through your shadow-touched form.
power.neoorigins.umbral_shadow_orb.name: Shadow Orb
power.neoorigins.umbral_shadow_orb.descr: Place an invisible orb that plunges a 28-block radius into Darkness. Up to 4 orbs active at once; placing a new one removes the oldest. Costs 2 hunger. 60-tick cooldown.
power.neoorigins.feline_active_launch.de: Pounces you powerfully in the direction you're looking. Costs 2 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.draconic_flight.name: Dragon Wings
power.neoorigins.draconic_flight.descrip: Glides freely through the air using powerful draconic wings.
power.neoorigins.draconic_active_firebal: Breathes a burst of 4 small fireballs in the direction you're looking. Costs 3 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_crop_growth.name: Nature's Blessing
power.neoorigins.sylvan_crop_growth.desc: Nearby crops grow faster in your presence, as if blessed by the land.
power.neoorigins.sylvan_active_root.name: Entangle
power.neoorigins.sylvan_active_root.desc: Roots all nearby creatures in place with powerful Slowness VI for 4 seconds. Costs 2 hunger. 200-tick cooldown.
power.neoorigins.revenant_active_phase.d: Phases through a solid wall in the direction you're looking. 3-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.revenant_active_bolt.de: Fires a bolt of withering energy that explodes into an area of harmful mist. Costs 1 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_starting_triden: Granted a powerful enchanted trident (Mending, Unbreaking III, Riptide III) when you choose this origin.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_scare_ocean.des: Passive ocean creatures — squid, fish, dolphins — flee from you on sight.
power.neoorigins.voidwalker_active_phase: Phase through a solid wall in the direction you're looking. Costs 3 hunger. 80-tick cooldown.
power.neoorigins.stoneguard_active_glows: Places a glowstone block at the surface you're looking at. 100-tick cooldown.
power.neoorigins.verdant_harvest_bonus.d: Breaking mature crops or logs yields one additional set of drops.
item.neoorigins.orb_of_origin.not_enough: You need %s experience levels to use this.
jei.neoorigins.orb_of_origin.info: Resets all origin selections and reopens the origin chooser. Costs 5 XP levels per previous use (first use is free). Consumed on use.
origins.neoorigins.inchling.name: Inchling
origins.neoorigins.inchling.description: A quarter-sized humanoid who scales walls with ease and moves with surprising speed — but a fragile body comes with the territory.
power.neoorigins.inchling_size.name: Diminutive
power.neoorigins.inchling_size.descripti: Only a quarter of normal size.
Can cling to and scale any surface.
power.neoorigins.inchling_no_fall_damage: So light that falling never hurts.
power.neoorigins.inchling_reduced_health: Has 10 fewer HP than a normal player.
power.neoorigins.inchling_hunger_efficie: Gets hungry half as fast as a normal player.
origins.neoorigins.sporeling.name: Sporeling
origins.neoorigins.sporeling.description: A fungal creature that thrives in darkness and mushroom fields — armed with toxic spores, but withered by sunlight.
power.neoorigins.sporeling_spore_cloud.d: Fires a spore projectile that erupts into a lingering cloud of poisonous spores. Costs 3 hunger. 12-second cooldown.
Can see clearly in total darkness.
power.neoorigins.sporeling_mushroom_buff: Regenerates health while in mushroom biomes.
power.neoorigins.sporeling_fungal_contac: Heals 1 HP every second while standing on or inside mushroom blocks or mycelium.
power.neoorigins.sporeling_natural_armor: Has 4 natural armor points from hardened fungal growth.
power.neoorigins.sporeling_daylight_dama: Takes 1 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
origins.neoorigins.frostborn.name: Frostborn
origins.neoorigins.frostborn.description: An elemental of ice and cold — freezes enemies, thrives in taigas, but fire and the Nether are devastating.
power.neoorigins.frostborn_freeze_aura.d: Blasts nearby enemies with extreme slowness. Costs 2 hunger. 10-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.frostborn_cold_buff.des: Gains strength while in cold taiga biomes.
power.neoorigins.frostborn_ice_walk.name: Ice Walk
power.neoorigins.frostborn_ice_walk.desc: Places ice at the block you're looking at. 1-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.frostborn_natural_armor: Has 4 natural armor points from crystallized ice.
power.neoorigins.frostborn_nether_damage: Takes 2 damage per second while in the Nether.
origins.neoorigins.strider.name: Strider
origins.neoorigins.strider.description: A Nether-native creature that walks on lava and heals in its warmth — but the cold overworld and water are crippling.
power.neoorigins.strider_fire_immunity.d: Immune to fire, lava, magma blocks, and burning.
power.neoorigins.strider_nether_buff.des: Gains a speed boost while in the Nether.
Takes 2 damage per second while in water or rain.
power.neoorigins.strider_lava_regen.name: Magma Recovery
power.neoorigins.strider_lava_regen.desc: Heals 2 HP per second while submerged in lava.
power.neoorigins.strider_night_vision.de: Can see clearly in complete darkness.
power.neoorigins.strider_natural_armor.d: +6 natural armor from hardened magma skin.
origins.neoorigins.siren.name: Siren
origins.neoorigins.siren.description: An aquatic enchantress born in the open ocean — charms creatures with an alluring presence and heals in the tides, but frail, slow, and dries out on land.
power.neoorigins.siren_charm.name: Alluring Presence
power.neoorigins.siren_charm.description: All mobs ignore you unless you attack them first.
power.neoorigins.siren_aquatic_speed.des: Swims much faster than a normal player.
power.neoorigins.siren_night_vision.name: Ocean Eyes
power.neoorigins.siren_night_vision.desc: Can see clearly in the dark depths.
power.neoorigins.siren_reduced_health.de: Has 4 fewer HP than a normal player.
power.neoorigins.siren_regen_in_water.de: Heals 1 HP per second while in water.
power.neoorigins.siren_dries_out.name: Dries Out
power.neoorigins.siren_dries_out.descrip: Air ticks down while you're out of water — surface too long and you suffocate.
origins.neoorigins.piglin.name: Piglin
origins.neoorigins.piglin.description: A gold-obsessed Nether warrior — powerful at home, feared by kin, but weakened outside the Nether.
power.neoorigins.piglin_nether_buff.name: Nether Fury
power.neoorigins.piglin_nether_buff.desc: Gains Strength II while in the Nether.
power.neoorigins.piglin_gold_affinity.de: Piglins and Piglin Brutes will not attack you.
power.neoorigins.piglin_fire_immunity.de: Immune to fire, lava, magma blocks, and all burning damage.
power.neoorigins.piglin_overworld_weakne: Afflicted with Weakness while in the overworld.
power.neoorigins.piglin_night_vision.des: Can see clearly in the dark.
power.neoorigins.piglin_soul_fire_damage: Soul fire burns deeper — takes 0.5 damage per second while in a Soul Sand Valley.
origins.neoorigins.hiveling.name: Hiveling
origins.neoorigins.hiveling.description: A bee-like insectoid who flies freely, stings foes with a venomous strike, and coaxes crops to grow. Fragile wings and endless hunger are the price of flight.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_flight.name: Buzzing Wings
power.neoorigins.hiveling_flight.descrip: Glide like an elytra user — bee wings beat fast. Press jump while falling to take off.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_sting.name: Venomous Sting
power.neoorigins.hiveling_sting.descript: Fires a venomous bolt at your target. Costs 1 hunger. 6-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_crop_growth.de: Nearby crops grow much faster in your presence.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_size.name: Small Frame
power.neoorigins.hiveling_size.descripti: 60% the size of a normal player.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_entity_group.d: Classified as an arthropod — vulnerable to Bane of Arthropods.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_reduced_health: Has 6 fewer HP than a normal player.
power.neoorigins.hiveling_hunger_drain.d: Gets hungry 50% faster — flying burns energy.
origins.neoorigins.cinderborn.name: Cinderborn
origins.neoorigins.cinderborn.descriptio: A volcanic fire elemental — immune to flame, terrifying to beasts, and healed by lava — but devastated by water.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_fire_immunit: Immune to fire, lava, magma blocks, and burning — a furnace wears its skin.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_fireball.des: Hurls a burst of 4 small fireballs in the direction you're looking. Costs 3 hunger. 5-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_natural_armo: +6 natural armor from cooled magma hide.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_lava_regen.d: Heals 1 HP per second while submerged in lava.
Gains Strength while in the Nether — home soil stokes the fire.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_water_weakne: Water is poison — takes 1.5 damage per second while in water or rain.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_night_vision: Inner fire illuminates even the darkest caves.
power.neoorigins.cinderborn_scare_mobs.d: Most passive creatures — livestock, villagers, wildlife — flee your blazing presence.
origins.neoorigins.sculkborn.name: Sculkborn
origins.neoorigins.sculkborn.description: A being of the deep dark — armored, resistant, and armed with sonic power — but slow, frail in sunlight, and weakened above ground.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_sonic_bolt.de: Fires a devastating sonic bolt that hits in a 7-block radius. Costs 2 hunger. 6-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_darkness_aura: Fires a sonic pulse that leaves a lingering field of Darkness in its wake. Costs 3 hunger. 15-second cooldown.
Perceives the world through vibrations — darkness is no obstacle.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_natural_armor: Has 8 natural armor points from dense sculk plating.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_daylight_dama: Takes 2 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_projectile_im: Arrows are deflected by vibration fields.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_vibration_sen: Nearby living entities glow — you feel their movement through the ground.
power.neoorigins.sculkborn_reduced_healt: Has 4 fewer HP than a normal player.
origins.neoorigins.enderite.name: Enderite
origins.neoorigins.enderite.description: A being born of the End — master of teleportation and phasing, graceful in descent, but vulnerable to water and daylight.
power.neoorigins.enderite_teleport.name: Warp Step
power.neoorigins.enderite_teleport.descr: Teleports up to 32 blocks in the direction you're looking. Costs 2 hunger. 3-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.enderite_phase.name: Void Phase
power.neoorigins.enderite_phase.descript: Phases through solid walls. Costs 3 hunger. 10-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.enderite_slow_fall.name: Ender Drift
power.neoorigins.enderite_slow_fall.desc: Falls gracefully, as if gravity barely applies.
power.neoorigins.enderite_night_vision.d: Can see clearly in complete darkness.
power.neoorigins.enderite_scare_endermit: Endermites and silverfish flee on sight.
power.neoorigins.enderite_water_damage.d: Takes 2 damage per second from contact with water or rain.
power.neoorigins.enderite_daylight_weakn: Takes 50% more damage while exposed to sunlight.
origins.neoorigins.class_warrior.name: Warrior
origins.neoorigins.class_warrior.descrip: A combat specialist who hits harder and stands firm against knockback.
power.neoorigins.class_warrior_battle_st: +2 natural armor — a fighter's poise turns lesser blows.
power.neoorigins.class_warrior_endurance: +2 max HP from hard-won battle scars.
power.neoorigins.class_warrior_iron_will: Immune to Weakness — no one saps your strength.
origins.neoorigins.class_archer.name: Archer
origins.neoorigins.class_archer.descript: A ranged specialist with perfect aim and nimble footwork.
power.neoorigins.class_archer_accuracy.d: All projectiles fly with perfect accuracy — no random spread.
power.neoorigins.class_archer_hawk_eye.d: Sees more clearly in low light — the hunter's gift.
power.neoorigins.class_archer_arthropod_: Hits on spiders and other arthropods leave them poisoned for 2 seconds.
power.neoorigins.class_archer_starting_b: Spawn with a Power I bow.
power.neoorigins.class_archer_starting_a: Spawn with a quiver of 16 arrows.
origins.neoorigins.class_miner.name: Miner
origins.neoorigins.class_miner.descripti: An expert excavator who breaks blocks faster and mines without tiring.
power.neoorigins.class_miner_speed.name: Mining Expert
Uses 30% less hunger while mining and exploring.
power.neoorigins.class_miner_stone_fists: Bare hands break stone like a stone pickaxe.
Sees more clearly in the dark — years underground sharpen the eyes.
+2 max HP from a miner's hardened frame.
origins.neoorigins.class_beastmaster.des: An animal tamer whose pets share your potion effects and whose potions last longer.
power.neoorigins.class_beastmaster_diffu: Potion effects you receive are shared with nearby tamed animals.
origins.neoorigins.class_explorer.name: Explorer
origins.neoorigins.class_explorer.descri: A seasoned traveler who starts equipped for adventure and rarely tires.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_kit.name: Starting Compass
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_kit.desc: Spawn with a compass in your inventory.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_clock.de: Spawn with a clock in your inventory.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_maps.des: Spawn with 9 empty maps in your inventory.
Uses 40% less hunger from all activities.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_sure_foo: Takes no fall damage — the trail teaches where to land.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_climbers: Steps up full blocks without jumping.
power.neoorigins.class_explorer_campfire: Slowly regenerates while within 5 blocks of any campfire — only while out of combat (5 seconds since last hit).
origins.neoorigins.class_sentinel.name: Sentinel
origins.neoorigins.class_sentinel.descri: A defensive specialist with natural armor, thorns, and unshakeable footing.
power.neoorigins.class_sentinel_thorns.d: Returns 25% of received damage to attackers.
power.neoorigins.class_sentinel_guard_st: +20% knockback resistance while sneaking — brace the line.
origins.neoorigins.class_herbalist.name: Herbalist
origins.neoorigins.class_herbalist.descr: A green thumb who accelerates crop growth, harvests bonus yields, and resists poison.
Nearby crops grow faster in your presence.
power.neoorigins.class_herbalist_green_t: Bone meal applications grow an extra stage.
power.neoorigins.class_herbalist_startin: Spawn with wheat seeds to start your garden.
Spawn with a pinch of bone meal.
origins.neoorigins.class_scout.name: Scout
origins.neoorigins.class_scout.descripti: A keen-eyed pathfinder with night vision, swift movement, and sure footing.
power.neoorigins.class_scout_night_visio: Can see clearly in the dark.
power.neoorigins.class_scout_speed.name: Swift Stride
power.neoorigins.class_scout_trackers_st: Steps up full blocks without jumping.
power.neoorigins.class_scout_trail_ratio: Spawn with a loaf of bread for the road.
origins.neoorigins.class_berserker.name: Berserker
origins.neoorigins.class_berserker.descr: A frenzied fighter who trades hunger for devastating raw power.
Gets hungry 50% faster — the rage burns energy.
power.neoorigins.class_berserker_rage_wi: +2 attack damage when at or below half health.
power.neoorigins.class_berserker_reckles: -2 natural armor — the rage forgets to guard.
power.neoorigins.class_berserker_thick_s: +20% knockback resistance — a berserker rarely budges.
origins.neoorigins.class_titan.name: Titan
origins.neoorigins.class_titan.descripti: A towering brute with extra health, extended reach, and imposing stature.
power.neoorigins.class_titan_size.name: Imposing
power.neoorigins.class_titan_health.name: Thick-Skinned
power.neoorigins.class_titan_reach.name: Long Arms
power.neoorigins.class_titan_reach.descr: Can interact with entities from further away.
power.neoorigins.class_titan_unmoving.de: +20% knockback resistance — a titan does not stumble.
power.neoorigins.class_titan_heavy_steps: Moves 10% slower — such bulk drags on the stride.
origins.neoorigins.class_rogue.name: Rogue
origins.neoorigins.class_rogue.descripti: A stealthy assassin who turns invisible while sneaking and deals devastating backstab damage.
power.neoorigins.class_rogue_sneaky.name: Hidden Presence
power.neoorigins.class_rogue_sneaky.desc: Your nameplate is never visible through walls.
power.neoorigins.class_rogue_stealth.des: After sneaking for 10 seconds, become invisible. Attacking from behind deals 2x damage.
power.neoorigins.class_rogue_parkour.des: Steps up full blocks without jumping.
origins.neoorigins.class_lumberjack.name: Lumberjack
origins.neoorigins.class_lumberjack.desc: A master woodsman who fells entire trees with one swing and crafts extra planks from logs.
power.neoorigins.class_lumberjack_tree_f: Breaking a log with an axe fells the entire tree at once.
power.neoorigins.class_lumberjack_bonus_: Crafting planks from logs yields 2 extra planks.
power.neoorigins.class_lumberjack_axe_ha: Bare hands chop wood like an iron axe.
power.neoorigins.class_lumberjack_starti: Spawn with an Unbreaking II iron axe.
origins.neoorigins.class_blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
origins.neoorigins.class_blacksmith.desc: A master crafter whose equipment is higher quality and whose repairs are more efficient.
power.neoorigins.class_blacksmith_qualit: Equipment you craft receives bonus attributes — toughness, damage, or mining speed.
power.neoorigins.class_blacksmith_repair: Anvil repairs cost less and restore more durability.
power.neoorigins.class_blacksmith_forge_: Bare hands break stone like a stone pickaxe.
Takes half damage from fire, lava, magma, and burning — forge-hardened skin.
power.neoorigins.class_blacksmith_starti: Spawn with 4 iron ingots to get the forge started.
origins.neoorigins.class_cook.name: Cook
origins.neoorigins.class_cook.descriptio: A culinary expert whose crafted food is more nourishing and who gains bonus XP from smoking.
power.neoorigins.class_cook_food.name: Good Meals
power.neoorigins.class_cook_food.descrip: Food you craft provides bonus hunger and saturation.
power.neoorigins.class_cook_smoker_xp.de: Gains double XP from cooking food in a smoker.
power.neoorigins.class_cook_seasoned_pal: Potion effects on you last 25% longer.
power.neoorigins.class_cook_knife.name: Cook's Knife
power.neoorigins.class_cook_knife.descri: Spawn with an iron sword — every cook needs a good blade.
origins.neoorigins.class_merchant.name: Merchant
origins.neoorigins.class_merchant.descri: A shrewd trader whose villager trades never run out and who finds rare goods from wandering traders.
power.neoorigins.class_merchant_trades.d: Villager trades never deplete for you.
power.neoorigins.class_merchant_rare_loo: Wandering traders offer you additional rare items.
power.neoorigins.class_merchant_starting: Spawn with an emerald to seed your first trade.
power.neoorigins.class_merchant_silver_t: Potion effects on you last 15% longer — hospitality lingers.
power.neoorigins.class_merchant_lucky_tr: +1 Luck — good fortune finds a good haggler.
origins.neoorigins.class_cleric.name: Cleric
origins.neoorigins.class_cleric.descript: A holy scholar with enhanced enchanting abilities and extended potion durations.
power.neoorigins.class_cleric_enchanting: Enchanting tables offer better enchantments near you.
power.neoorigins.class_cleric_potions.de: All potion effects last twice as long.
power.neoorigins.class_cleric_turn_undea: Hits on undead leave them Weakened for 4 seconds.
power.neoorigins.class_cleric_divine_sig: Sees more clearly in low light — a gift from above.
power.neoorigins.class_cleric_starting_b: Spawn with a writable book for prayers and notes.
origins.neoorigins.class_nitwit.name: Nitwit
origins.neoorigins.class_nitwit.descript: Not particularly good at anything. Sometimes the simplest path is the right one.
origins.neoorigins.class_fisher.name: Fisher
origins.neoorigins.class_fisher.descript: Life at the water's edge — draws luck from the tides, swims like a seal, and starts with a blessed rod.
power.neoorigins.class_fisher_waters_luc: +1 Luck while in water — the tide favors you.
power.neoorigins.class_fisher_sea_legs.d: Half drown damage — lungs accustomed to the deep.
power.neoorigins.class_fisher_starting_r: Spawn with a fishing rod enchanted with Luck of the Sea I and Lure I.
origins.neoorigins.class_mason.name: Mason
origins.neoorigins.class_mason.descripti: Stone yields to practiced hands — breaks blocks faster, callused palms armor the body, and a pick is always within reach.
power.neoorigins.class_mason_stone_hands: Bare hands break stone like a stone pickaxe.
power.neoorigins.class_mason_strong_grip: +1 natural armor from a lifetime of callused grip.
power.neoorigins.class_mason_starting_pi: Spawn with an Efficiency I stone pickaxe.
power.neoorigins.class_mason_block_reach: +1 block placement reach — a mason's arm knows where the wall ends.
origins.neoorigins.class_paladin.name: Paladin
origins.neoorigins.class_paladin.descrip: A holy warrior — undead falter at a touch, wither cannot take hold, and the light of a beacon heals wounds.
power.neoorigins.class_paladin_turn_unde: Hits on undead leave them Weakened for 4 seconds.
power.neoorigins.class_paladin_holy_armo: +2 natural armor — the light shields you.
power.neoorigins.class_paladin_beacon_re: Slowly regenerates while within 8 blocks of a beacon.
power.neoorigins.class_paladin_starting_: Spawn with a Smite I iron sword.
power.neoorigins.class_paladin_effect_im: Immune to Wither — the blight cannot touch you.
origins.neoorigins.necromancer.name: Necromancer
origins.neoorigins.necromancer.descripti: A master of death who commands undead minions — wither skeletons and archers fight at your side, but your own life force is bound to theirs.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_summon_with: Summons a wither skeleton to fight for you. Max 2 at once. Costs 6 hunger. 30-second cooldown. You take 1 damage if it dies in combat.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_summon_skel: Summons a skeleton archer to fight for you. Max 3 at once. Costs 4 hunger. 20-second cooldown. You take 1 damage if it dies in combat.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_entity_grou: Classified as undead. Harmed by Instant Health, healed by Instant Damage, immune to Poison. Vulnerable to Smite.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_night_visio: Can see clearly in total darkness.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_daylight_da: Takes 1.5 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.necromancer_reduced_hea: Has 6 fewer HP than a normal player.
Natural health regeneration is reduced to 40% of normal.
origins.neoorigins.gorgon.name: Gorgon
origins.neoorigins.gorgon.description: A stone-skinned monstrosity whose gaze petrifies and whose fists shatter — but the weight of stone slows every step.
Freezes all nearby enemies with Slowness V. Costs 3 hunger. 15-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.gorgon_stone_fists.name: Stone Fists
power.neoorigins.gorgon_granite_hide.des: Has 6 natural armor points from stone skin.
power.neoorigins.gorgon_heavy_frame.name: Ponderous
power.neoorigins.gorgon_size.name: Imposing Bulk
power.neoorigins.gorgon_hunger_drain.des: Gets hungry 50% faster — maintaining stone form burns energy.
origins.neoorigins.automaton.name: Automaton
origins.neoorigins.automaton.description: A mechanical construct that never drowns or starves — but healing potions fizzle, natural recovery is glacial, and every step is heavy.
power.neoorigins.automaton_iron_frame.de: +8 natural armor from solid iron plating.
power.neoorigins.automaton_no_drown.name: Sealed Chassis
power.neoorigins.automaton_no_drown.desc: Does not need to breathe. Cannot drown.
power.neoorigins.automaton_no_hunger.des: Never gets hungry. Runs on an internal power source.
power.neoorigins.automaton_hide_hunger_b: The hunger bar is hidden — automatons don't eat.
The air bar is hidden — automatons don't breathe.
power.neoorigins.automaton_potion_resist: Immune to Regeneration, Instant Health, and Poison. Other potion effects still apply.
Built-in optical sensors allow clear vision in darkness.
power.neoorigins.automaton_heavy_chassis: Moves 15% slower — heavy frame, heavy steps.
Natural healing runs at 25% rate — built to endure, not recover.
origins.neoorigins.kraken.name: Kraken
origins.neoorigins.kraken.description: A colossal deep-sea predator born in the open ocean — devastating underwater with tentacle lashes, ink shots, and summoned guardians, but beached, sun-burned, and dried out on the surface.
power.neoorigins.kraken_tentacle_lash.de: Fires a shadow bolt that blinds and slows all enemies in a 6-block radius. Costs 2 hunger. 6-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.kraken_ink_shot.name: Ink Shot
power.neoorigins.kraken_ink_shot.descrip: Fires a bolt of concentrated ink that heavily slows enemies in a 5-block radius. Costs 2 hunger. 8-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.kraken_deep_current.des: Swims far faster than any surface dweller.
power.neoorigins.kraken_pressure_armor.d: Has 6 natural armor points from deep-sea hide.
power.neoorigins.kraken_regen_in_water.d: Heals 2 HP per second while in water.
power.neoorigins.kraken_beached.name: Beached
power.neoorigins.kraken_beached.descript: Moves 30% slower on land — not built for walking.
Takes 1 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
Summons a guardian to fight for you. Max 2 at once. Costs 5 hunger. 20-second cooldown. You take 1 damage if it dies in combat.
power.neoorigins.kraken_massive.name: Colossal
power.neoorigins.kraken_dries_out.name: Dries Out
power.neoorigins.kraken_dries_out.descri: Air ticks down while you're out of water — surface too long and you suffocate.
power.neoorigins.abyssal_summon_guardian: Summons a guardian to fight for you. Max 2 at once. Costs 5 hunger. 20-second cooldown. You take 1 damage if it dies in combat.
origins.neoorigins.warden.name: Warden
origins.neoorigins.warden.description: Born from the deep dark — senses the world through vibrations, unleashes a sonic boom at range, and hits like a battering ram. Lumbering and pained by sunlight.
power.neoorigins.warden_sonic_boom.name: Sonic Boom
power.neoorigins.warden_sonic_boom.descr: Fires a devastating sonic blast (8 magic damage + Slowness III in a 10-block area). Costs 4 hunger. 20-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.warden_echolocation.des: Nearby living entities glow, visible even through walls.
power.neoorigins.warden_tremor_sense.des: Senses distant entities — every 2 seconds, anything within 24 blocks glows for 3 seconds.
power.neoorigins.warden_strength.name: Deep Dark Strength
power.neoorigins.warden_ancient_hide.des: +10 natural armor from dense sculk plating.
power.neoorigins.warden_night_vision.des: Perceives the world through vibrations — darkness is irrelevant.
Takes 1 damage per second when exposed to direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.warden_lumbering.name: Lumbering
power.neoorigins.warden_lumbering.descri: Moves 30% slower than normal — a devastating but plodding force.
origins.neoorigins.dwarf.name: Dwarf
origins.neoorigins.dwarf.description: A stout underground craftsman — compact, armored, and tireless at the forge, but short-limbed and slow on the surface.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_compact_frame.des: 80% the size of a normal player — fits through tighter spaces.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_stout_constitutio: +4 natural armor — dense muscle and bone.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_darkvision.name: Darkvision
power.neoorigins.dwarf_darkvision.descri: Can see clearly in total darkness — a lifetime underground.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_sturdy_legs.name: Sturdy Legs
power.neoorigins.dwarf_sturdy_legs.descr: Moves 15% slower — short but steady legs.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_stonecunning.name: Stonecunning
power.neoorigins.dwarf_stonecunning.desc: Breaks blocks 25% faster — practiced hands on any material.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_short_reach.name: Short Arms
power.neoorigins.dwarf_short_reach.descr: Block interaction range reduced by 0.5 — short arms, strong grip.
power.neoorigins.dwarf_mining_hunger.des: Uses 25% less hunger from all activities — built for endurance.
Granted a dwarven iron pickaxe (Unbreaking II, Efficiency I) when you choose this origin.
origins.neoorigins.breeze.name: Breeze
origins.neoorigins.breeze.description: A creature of wind born in the Trial Chambers — fast, airborne, and armed with gusts, but light and fragile.
power.neoorigins.breeze_wind_charge.name: Wind Charge
power.neoorigins.breeze_wind_charge.desc: Launches a wind projectile that knocks enemies back. 5-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.breeze_wind_dash.name: Wind Dash
power.neoorigins.breeze_wind_dash.descri: Bursts forward on a gust of wind. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.breeze_no_fall_damage.d: Toggleable: the wind catches you as you fall. On by default — toggle off with the skill key to land critical hits.
power.neoorigins.breeze_jump_boost.name: Updraft
power.neoorigins.breeze_jump_boost.descr: Toggleable: gusts lift your jump higher (Jump Boost II). On by default — toggle off with the skill key if you want normal jump height.
power.neoorigins.breeze_speed_boost.name: Tailwind
power.neoorigins.breeze_speed_boost.desc: Moves 15% faster — the wind pushes you forward.
power.neoorigins.breeze_reduced_health.d: −8 max HP (4 hearts). A body of wind is barely a body at all.
power.neoorigins.breeze_light_frame.name: Light Frame
power.neoorigins.breeze_light_frame.desc: 90% the size of a normal player — light and airy.
origins.neoorigins.vampire.name: Vampire
origins.neoorigins.vampire.description: An undead predator of the night — swift, strong, and eternally hungry. Sunlight is agony, water burns, and only raw flesh sustains you.
power.neoorigins.vampire_entity_group.de: Classified as undead. Harmed by Instant Health, healed by Instant Damage, immune to Poison.
power.neoorigins.vampire_night_vision.de: Can see clearly in total darkness.
power.neoorigins.vampire_speed_boost.des: Moves 15% faster — a blur in the moonlight.
power.neoorigins.vampire_daylight_damage: Catches fire and takes 2 damage per second in direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.vampire_slow_regen.name: Corpse Vitality
power.neoorigins.vampire_slow_regen.desc: Natural health regeneration is reduced to 40% of normal.
power.neoorigins.vampire_food_restrictio: Can only eat raw meat, rotten flesh, and spider eyes.
Takes 1 damage per second while in water or rain.
origins.neoorigins.monster_tamer.name: Monster Tamer
origins.neoorigins.monster_tamer.descrip: A fearless beast handler who bends hostile mobs to their will. Alone they are frail, but with a loyal pack at their side, they are a force to be reckoned with.
power.neoorigins.tamer_tame_mob.name: Dominate
power.neoorigins.tamer_tame_mob.descript: Look at a hostile mob and activate to bend it to your will. It will follow you and defend you. Max 4 tamed mobs. Costs 3 hunger. 10-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.tamer_command_pack.name: Sic 'Em
power.neoorigins.tamer_command_pack.desc: Look at a target and activate to command your entire pack to attack it. 2-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.tamer_horde_regen.name: Pack Bond
power.neoorigins.tamer_horde_regen.descr: Your tamed mobs slowly regenerate 1 HP every 6 seconds while out of combat.
power.neoorigins.tamer_weak_alone.name: Lone Weakness
power.neoorigins.tamer_weak_alone.descri: Deal 25% less melee damage — you rely on your pack to fight.
power.neoorigins.tamer_hunger_drain.name: Feed the Pack
power.neoorigins.tamer_hunger_drain.desc: Hunger drains 50% faster from the strain of maintaining your bond.
origins.neoorigins.earth_mage.name: Earth Mage
origins.neoorigins.earth_mage.descriptio: A stalwart geomancer who slams the ground to rupture foes and raises stone walls at a gesture. Immovable as a mountain, but the earth holds them close — water and heights are not their friends.
Slam the earth, dealing 6 damage and knocking back all nearby entities. Costs 3 hunger. 6-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_stone_wall.d: Place a cobblestone block where you're looking. 2-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_rooted.name: Rooted
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_rooted.descr: Take 50% less knockback — firm as bedrock.
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_heavy.name: Heavy
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_heavy.descri: Cannot swim — you sink like a stone.
power.neoorigins.earth_mage_earthbound.d: Take 50% more fall damage. The ground reclaims its own.
origins.neoorigins.water_mage.name: Water Mage
origins.neoorigins.water_mage.descriptio: A fluid caster who wields tides and healing currents. At home in the ocean, but withers in arid wastelands.
power.neoorigins.water_mage_tidal_wave.d: Blast a cone of water forward, dealing 4 damage and pushing enemies away. 5-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.water_mage_healing_mist: Release a healing wave that restores 6 HP to you and nearby players. Costs 3 hunger. 10-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.water_mage_aquatic.name: Aquatic
power.neoorigins.water_mage_moisture_reg: Slowly regenerate health while submerged in water.
Take damage in deserts and badlands — the dry air saps your strength.
power.neoorigins.water_mage_fragile.name: Fragile
power.neoorigins.water_mage_fragile.desc: Deal 25% less melee damage. Your power flows through water, not muscle.
origins.neoorigins.fire_mage.name: Fire Mage
origins.neoorigins.fire_mage.description: A volatile pyromancer wreathed in flame — hurls fireballs, bursts into an inferno, and burns those who strike you. Fire cannot harm you, but water is your undoing.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_fireball.name: Fireball
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_fireball.desc: Hurl a volley of four small fireballs in the direction you're looking. Costs 3 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_inferno_burst: Release a burst of flame that damages all nearby enemies. Costs 3 hunger. 8-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_flame_cloak.d: Attackers take 30% of the damage they deal as fire retaliation.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_fire_immunity: Immune to fire, lava, and magma block damage. Lava is merely warm.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_water_weaknes: Take 1 damage per second while in water or rain.
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_hunger.name: Internal Furnace
power.neoorigins.fire_mage_hunger.descri: Hunger drains 50% faster from the heat within.
origins.neoorigins.air_mage.name: Air Mage
origins.neoorigins.air_mage.description: A swift aeromancer who hurls wind charges, spins a whirlwind of displacement, and rides updrafts into the sky. Light as a breeze, but frail as a leaf.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_wind_charge.de: Shoot a wind charge that creates a burst of knockback on impact.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
power.neoorigins.air_mage_whirlwind.desc: Hurl an air bolt that spawns a tornado on impact — pulls, lifts, and spins nearby entities for four seconds. Costs 4 hunger.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_updraft.name: Updraft
power.neoorigins.air_mage_updraft.descri: Launch yourself skyward on a column of air.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_no_fall_damage: Air cushions your fall — you take no fall damage.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_zephyr.name: Zephyr
power.neoorigins.air_mage_zephyr.descrip: Carried by constant tailwinds — move 20% faster on foot.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_slow_fall.name: Featherfall
power.neoorigins.air_mage_slow_fall.desc: Descend gently, as if gravity barely applies. Toggle off with the skill key when you need to drop fast.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_fragile.name: Fragile Frame
power.neoorigins.air_mage_fragile.descri: −4 max HP. A body of air is not built to last.
power.neoorigins.air_mage_light.name: Lightweight
power.neoorigins.air_mage_light.descript: Take 50% more knockback — the wind carries you too easily.
origins.neoorigins.gravity_mage.name: Gravity Mage
origins.neoorigins.gravity_mage.descript: A warper of gravitational fields who bends space itself. Pull enemies into a crushing singularity or blast them away — but your own body is untethered from the earth.
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_well.name: Gravity Well
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_well.descr: Fire a dark orb that collapses into a black hole on impact. Nearby entities are pulled toward its center and take damage for four seconds. Costs 4 hunger. 20-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_repulse.de: Release a gravitational shockwave that blasts all nearby entities away. Costs 3 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_levitation: Toggleable: defy gravity and rise on command (Levitation I). Off by default — toggle on with the skill key.
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_unmoored.d: Take 75% more knockback — your weakened gravity makes you easy to launch.
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_frail.name: Frail
power.neoorigins.gravity_mage_frail.desc: Deal 25% less melee damage. Your power is in the pull, not the punch.
origins.neoorigins.darkness_mage.name: Darkness Mage
origins.neoorigins.darkness_mage.descrip: A shadow-weaving sorcerer who summons orbiting shadow orbs and steps between pools of darkness. Cloaked and deadly at night, but sunlight burns away your power.
power.neoorigins.darkness_mage_shadow_or: Place a shadow orb at your location that inflicts Darkness and Blindness on nearby enemies. Up to 3 orbs active at once. Costs 3 hunger. 5-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.darkness_mage_shadow_st: Teleport to where you're looking, up to 24 blocks away. Costs 2 hunger. 4-second cooldown.
power.neoorigins.darkness_mage_shadow_cl: Mobs detect you from only 40% of their normal range.
power.neoorigins.darkness_mage_sunburn.d: Take 1 damage per second in direct sunlight.
power.neoorigins.darkness_mage_light_sen: Mine 30% slower — the light of exposed surfaces stings your eyes.
